commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a new `src/oc-path` parser/resolver/emitter substrate for md/jsonc/jsonl/yaml, an `openclaw path` CLI, docs, fixtures, tests, `.gitignore` exceptions, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review findings: source inspection of head `4cd67a89059ab85a1dea7da6025cde797552ee81` shows the formatter guard, file-wildcard CLI path, and quote-aware pattern detection issues. A current-main bug reproduction is not applicable because this PR adds a new feature surface.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer scope, a dirty branch, related competing substrate work, and P2 correctness findings make this a human-review item rather than a safe automated repair lane.
